units.quality_notes: Modern, clean, and well-maintained with updated kitchen appliances.

units.title: Condo in 55 plus resort style community on the bay!
units.notes:
QR Code Link to This Post
Move-in ready in Imperial Cove! This light and open 55+ waterfront condo offers a comfortable floor plan with an open kitchen, ss refrigerator, range/oven, dishwasher and microwave, spacious living and dining areas, a primary bedroom with ensuite bathroom and great closet space, plus a second bedroom ideal for guests or an office. Nice spacious sunroom. Imperial Cove offers resort-style amenities including a waterfront pool, fitness center, sauna, shuffleboard, fishing pier, scenic boardwalk, putting green, library, and grilling areas. Minutes to Clearwater Beach, shopping, dining, Tampa International Airport, and St. Pete-Clearwater International Airport.  Gated Community.  Call or text, no emails please.
units.quality_notes: No interior photos of the unit to assess its condition.

units.title: Brand New Manufactured Home in 55+ Community
units.notes:
QR Code Link to This Post
Snag this stunning, brand-new home before anyone else! The open floor plan, bright white cabinetry, and luxury vinyl flooring are just waiting for your personal touch. The spacious primary bedroom comes with its own private bath. LED lighting adds a modern vibe throughout. Plus, the attached carport and shed make life super convenient. Make your move today!
units.quality_notes: Fresh paint, new vinyl flooring, and clean finishes make this unit look move-in ready.

units.title: Spacious 3BR Family Home with Huge Yard
units.notes:
QR Code Link to This Post
Spacious 3BR/2BA family home! Huge driveway and front yard, backyard with garden space and a gazebo, plus room for a pool. Perfect for family living and entertaining!
For any additional questions or information, please call me.
units.quality_notes: Clean and well-maintained; however, finishes like cabinets and counters appear dated.

units.title: FOR RENT A1
units.notes:
QR Code Link to This Post
Escape to the tranquil setting of Courtyard Gardenview Apartment Homes. Experience the perfect balance of comfort and style with our beautiful 2 Bed / 1.5 Bath apartment homes. Select fully renovated units feature brand new cabinets, flooring, and more, ensuring a fresh and contemporary living experience. Immerse yourself in the serenity of our community while enjoying the ease of onsite laundry facilities and a wide selection of floor plans to cater to your needs. Our prime central location provides convenient access to the breathtaking beaches of Clearwater, the vibrant city of Tampa, and renowned shopping destinations. Get a glimpse into the inviting ambiance and layout of our units by browsing through our sample pictures. NOTE: Photos may not reflect the exact unit currently available and square footage is approximate. To fully appreciate the beauty of our property, schedule a tailored appointment to view it in person. Don't let this opportunity to reside in a meticulously maintained and captivating community slip away. Contact Radiant Asset Management today and mention the property that has captured your interest
units.quality_notes: Manually adjusted: bedroom ceiling has a visible water stain/damage in photo 7, despite otherwise clean, updated finishes.

units.title: 2/2 Renovated.. 2 Mo's. Free!!!! Great Clearwater Location..Secluded!!

We are a small, quiet and quaint apartment community conveniently located Roosevelt Blvd. and a minutes away from great shopping, fantastic restaurants, and beautiful beaches. Fenced in patio's and back yards in select units
PET FRIENDLY!!🐶🐱 Breed restrictions and fees apply. Reserved parking!
units.quality_notes: Bedroom looks clean and well-kept, but sparse photos limit full unit assessment.

units.title: Covered Parking Included
units.notes:
QR Code Link to This Post
Come and enjoy this 2 bed 2 bath Villa in New Haven, a 55+ Community. Now Leasing a updated and modern Villa with ceramic tile floors throughout. Master Bedroom with Ensuite bathroom, walk in closet with access to the Patio. Over 1200 square feet of living space. Kitchen is open to living and dining room makes it a great place for entertaining. 42 Inch Cabinets in kitchen for plenty of storage space. Property includes new washer/dryer in Laundry room inside villa! Plenty of closet space throughout! 1 covered parking space included. Only Pay electric, all other amenities included in the Rent.
units.quality_notes: Modern kitchen, clean, well-maintained, and appears move-in ready.

units.title: Discover This Great Modern One-Story Family-Friendly Warm 3 Bedroom Home
units.notes:
QR Code Link to This Post
Welcome to the house you can make your home. All this place needs is a dose of your personality. The living space offers plenty of room for formal dining and a relaxed entertainment area. Prepare delicious meals in a great kitchen perfect for any occasion. Stainless steel appliances, granite countertops and roomy cabinets deliver a kitchen that makes every meal easier. Turn this fenced backyard into the ideal outdoor space. Here's your invitation to host dinner parties and backyard barbecues, or enjoy a little quiet time to do you. There's also a patio, and plenty of room for outdoor plants. Don't wait too long to lease!
units.quality_notes: Clean, updated flooring and paint, well-maintained overall. Looks move-in ready.

Property Description:
Everything is included in the rent. Electric, water, sewer, trash, and high-speed internet are all covered, saving most tenants $250–$300 per month compared to a standard lease. What you see is what you pay.
Unit 206 is a second-floor 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom home with a private balcony, priced as the most accessible 2-bedroom option in the building. At $1,995 per month with all utilities included, the effective cost compares favorably to most 2-bedroom units in the Clearwater area where tenants pay utilities separately. The kitchen features quartz countertops and stainless steel appliances. Designer lighting, tile flooring, and an in-unit washer/dryer are included. Sound-insulated construction throughout.
Bay Vista is a brand new mixed-use building completed in 2026, with elevator access, keyless entry, secured entry, EV charging, a fitness center, a package delivery room, and one assigned parking space per unit. One mile from St. Pete-Clearwater Airport, 12–15 minutes to Downtown St. Pete, and 20 minutes to Tampa. Jabil, Honeywell, Raymond James, and BayCare are all nearby.
This is the entry point into a brand new building at a competitive price. It won't stay available long.
2 Bed | 2 Bath | 800 sq ft | 2nd Floor | Balcony | $1,995/mo | All Utilities Included. Virtually staged. Unit is unfurnished.

units.title: 2/1 Apartment for Lease! $ 1,500/month! Available Now!
units.notes:
QR Code Link to This Post
2/1 Apartment Tri-plex for Lease! $ 1,500/month! /Available Now!
Contact David Brown at
show contact info
if interested.
Applications being accepted. No application fee.
Come take a look at our 2 bedroom and 1 bath apartment for rent that has been recently updated.
The apartment has tile throughout with a new galley kitchen, new refrigerator and stove with bar seating. Updated interior with new paint and no more popcorn ceilings. Bathroom has a toilet, sink and vanity, exhaust fan. Tiled shower. The utility room includes a washer/dryer connection. This property has a backyard. We are pet friendly with a non-refundable pet deposit, but (Pet must weigh less than 30 lbs.).
Located within a 10-minute commute to I-275 and is located between South Clearwater and St. Petersburg.
The monthly rent is $ 1,5000 with a $ 1,500 security deposit and 1 (one) year's lease.
Tenant is responsible for all utilities.
No Evictions or Felonies.
Property address is 6417 146th Ave N Apt # A Clearwater, FL 33760.

units.title: 3-bedroom, 2-bath home in the heart of Pinellas Park.
units.notes:
QR Code Link to This Post
Welcome to this well-maintained 3-bedroom, 2-bath home in the heart of Pinellas Park. This spacious residence features a bright and open floor plan with plenty of natural light, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. The living and dining areas flow seamlessly, perfect for everyday living and entertaining. The kitchen offers ample cabinet space and functionality, while the bedrooms are generously sized with great closet storage. Enjoy a private outdoor area ideal for relaxing or hosting guests. Conveniently located near shopping, dining, parks, and just a short drive to the beautiful Gulf beaches, this home offers comfort and convenience in a great location.

units.title: 3br/1ba  Clearwater FL
units.notes:
QR Code Link to This Post
Nice 3Bd/1Ba apartment on a second floor in 2 story house.  Nice  Large living room w/fireplace, linens and guest closets.  Kitchen w/two big windows and a lot of extra spaces.  All NEW Appliances! Kitchen also has pantry. Bathroom with tube and shower.
Own water heather, electric stove, large R/F, and washer/dryer stackable machine  hook up inside the apartment. Hardwood floor in a rooms,  tiles in the kitchen and bath.  Each room has own A/C unit. Large A/C with heat in living room.  Nice fenced back yard. Apartment has own water and electric meters.  12 months Lease.
Available for rent NOW.  First month $500 off for immediate occupancy.
Quiet neighborhood, safe area, convenient location -close to Downtown, Library, Clearwater Beach, banks, shopping, bus line, etc.......... Just one blook away from the Bay. You can go fishing every day.
One month security deposit.  Tenant is paying own bills.
For showing, more info and pictures - call
show contact info
Val.
You will not be disappoint !!!!!!!
